_description: Security Expert - skill-read advisory + research tracking (delegated to @fusengine/harness)

PreToolUse._description: Harness: advisory (allow + additionalContext, NON-blocking) to read security skill before code edits when unread (ports check-security-skill.py)

PostToolUse._description: Harness: track security-skill Reads + Context7/Exa research into ~/.claude/logs/00-security state (ports track-skill-read.py + track-mcp-research.py)
